subject: subagentknowledge.com TOS

mutual_obligations.notes: TOS is unilateral by nature — operator sets terms for end-users

definition_scope.notes: No TOS draft found at cowork/apps/legal/tos-draft.md — cannot evaluate scope. Placeholder entry created.

term.notes: No TOS draft available to evaluate term length

standard_carveouts.notes: Cannot verify carveouts without draft document

ip_provisions.notes: TOS for an AI-powered product should clarify IP ownership of user inputs, generated outputs, and model artifacts

limitation_of_liability.notes: AI product TOS requires clear limitation of liability for model outputs, hallucinations, and downstream decisions

data_processing.notes: Must address data collection, processing, retention, and deletion rights under applicable privacy laws

acceptable_use.notes: AI product TOS should include acceptable use policy covering prohibited uses of the platform

issues.what: No TOS draft exists — cowork/apps/legal/tos-draft.md not found
issues.risk: Cannot ship product without Terms of Service
issues.suggested_fix: Draft TOS covering: service description, acceptable use, IP rights, limitation of liability, data processing, dispute resolution

issues.risk: AI product without model output disclaimers exposes operator to liability for hallucinations and downstream decisions
issues.suggested_fix: Include disclaimer that AI outputs are not professional advice, no warranty of accuracy, user responsible for verification

issues.risk: Privacy law non-compliance risk across jurisdictions
issues.suggested_fix: Add data processing addendum or inline privacy terms covering collection, use, retention, deletion, and sub-processor disclosure

issues.what: IP ownership of generated content unclear
issues.risk: Disputes over ownership of AI-generated outputs
issues.suggested_fix: Clarify that user retains rights to inputs, operator retains rights to platform/models, generated outputs ownership follows applicable law with appropriate license grants

recommendation: YELLOW — Counsel review needed. No TOS draft exists yet. Before drafting, legal counsel should define positions on: (1) AI output liability limitations, (2) data processing terms, (3) IP ownership of generated content, (4) acceptable use policy for AI features. Target: draft TOS within 5 business days, counsel review within 10.
next_steps: Define AI-specific liability limitations with counsel
Add data processing terms aligned with privacy requirements
Define acceptable use policy for AI-powered features
Route draft to product-management-coworker for product alignment review
disclaimer: This is workflow assistance, not legal advice. Review by qualified legal counsel is required.
